LanguageData.CheatBed_Animal.label: cheat animal bed
LanguageData.CheatBed_Animal.description: A reinforced biological stabilization pad designed for animals. Provides extreme rest efficiency and accelerated recovery, ensuring your pets and livestock return to peak condition almost instantly. Because even animals deserve overpowered treatment.
LanguageData.CheatBed_AnimalBox.label: cheat animal sleeping box
LanguageData.CheatBed_AnimalBox.description: An enclosed overengineered sleeping box for animals. Provides extreme rest efficiency and accelerated healing in a protected structure.
LanguageData.CheatBed_AnimalLounger.label: cheat animal lounger
LanguageData.CheatBed_AnimalLounger.description: An ultra-soft overpowered animal lounger. Grants absurd rest speed and rapid immunity gain.
